title: Nexus PromoteWorldKbCandidateRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/worlds/{world_id}/kb/promote-candidate (V1.73). adopt/reject/merge a pending candidate via the entity-scope-model §5.5.2 promotion state machine. Per-row OCC on kb_extract_jobs.version.

expected_version.description: Per-row version of the candidate row (kb_extract_jobs.version).

merge_target_id.description: Confirmed KeyBlock id to merge into. Required when action=merge.

patch.description: Optional fields applied on adopt (e.g. refine title/body before confirming).

idempotency_key.description: Optional idempotency key (reserved; V1.73 accepts and ignores).
